mapper.sql: id, project_name, project_code, location, status, description, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select from project where deleted = 0
and (project_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or project_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by created_at desc, id desc
select from project where id = #{projectId} and deleted = 0
select from project where project_code = #{projectCode} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update project set project_name = #{projectName}, project_code = #{projectCode}, location = #{location}, description = #{description}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
